allowed_claims: Threshold relations describe observed per-seed margins against frozen reference surfaces
Boundary rungs classify the lowest expression actually reached
Two-axis readings may propose a bounded next question without changing the recorded result
blocked_relabels: above-threshold sign as native capacity or regime
unexpected property as proof of the original hypothesis
developmental interpretation as positive LGRC evidence
record.claim_ceiling: AE01-C0 interpretation infrastructure only until lane evidence and dedicated gates exist
record.reopening_condition: A lane result, metric calibration, or later review exposes an unrepresented boundary or invalid interpretation relation
terminal_effects: No threshold relation alone determines a terminal classification
Hard validity failure blocks scientific interpretation but preserves operational failure history
Hard claim-safety failure removes the unsafe claim while preserving valid lower observations
